title: callicarpa furfuracea
intro: Callicarpa furfuracea, also known as the Purple Plumier or Fuzzy Coral Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa furfuracea include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tonics, or applied topically to the skin.
